policy.normal: strictly lower actual cost; known 100% dual ORT; two fresh seeds >=90%; runtime errors 0; full checker; strict data_prop; truthful runtime shapes; standard domains; no lookup/cloak/giant; Conv-family bias UB0
policy.private_risk: known and both fresh seeds must be 100% dual ORT in addition to all normal structural gates

046.true_rule: Split the three-row path at blank columns, use gray-5 endpoints to accumulate vertical offsets, remove separators, recolor each segment with its segment color, and concatenate the aligned path.
046.structure: large but standard-domain compiled rule; no runtime-shape mismatch, banned op, giant initializer, lookup classifier, or Conv-family bias UB

157.true_rule: Match each gray creature near the bottom to its partially hidden black footprint under the top red field, recolor the corresponding hidden creature blue, and erase the gray references.
157.structure: private-zero catalog; current graph contains three stored correction keys, so no derived cheap model can qualify without a new sound implementation and fresh100 proof
157.candidate: none; sound cheaper rebuild not justified at this floor

161.true_rule: Identify the laser color from four border endpoints and draw the full marked horizontal and/or vertical lines; discard all distractors.
161.structure: three-node polynomial Einsum/Pow/Einsum; truthful shapes and standard domain, but decoded Sakana rule itself matched only 198/200 on each fresh generator seed because distractor collisions make the selector ambiguous
161.candidate: historical 176/188 reductions are known failures; no admissible lower model

189.true_rule: Find the 2x2 palette and 6x6 green mask around the cyan divider, account for horizontal/vertical flips, and color each mask cell by its palette quadrant.
189.structure: current fixed baseline has declared-vs-runtime shape cloaks and is not dual-runtime safe; retained only as protected baseline, never offered as a new candidate
189.candidate: none satisfying the truthful dual-runtime gate

384.true_rule: Crop the yellow object's tight bounding box and replace every source cell by a 2x2 block.
384.structure: current fixed baseline hides two 30x30 intermediates as 1x1; protected but ineligible as provenance for a new truthful candidate

193.true_rule: For each color, retain a cell only when it has same-color support on a vertical neighbor and on a horizontal neighbor; this removes isolated static and keeps the rectangular boxes.
193.structure: honest single group-10 Conv, 4x4 weights plus ten-channel bias; truthful shapes and Conv bias length 10

lower_bound_search.four_by_four_without_bias_cost_160: 15 paddings rejected by pattern conflicts; incumbent padding [2,2,1,1] is not linearly separable through the origin

195.true_rule: Tightly crop the 3x enlarged 3x3 Conway sprite, downsample it to the motif, and emit the 9x9 self-product/Kronecker pattern in gray.
195.structure: current fixed baseline hides full-grid quantization/crop intermediates; protected but not a truthful candidate source

281.true_rule: Use the cyan dot to choose a cardinal direction, extend the colored framed box to the dot, continue the outer border, and fill the interior color; rotations make the rule direction-independent.
281.structure: current fixed baseline uses a 38-input giant Einsum and hidden full-grid intermediates, so it fails the new no-giant/truthful candidate policy
281.candidate: none below 161 under the clean policy
